channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cayetano rejects claims of rushed Senate rules changes amid warnings of destabilization
item.description: Senator Alan Peter Cayetano has denied accusations that he and his allies are rushing or “railroading” proposed changes to Senate rules, insisting that the process remains within proper parliamentary ...

item.title: Kenya Strengthens Ebola Preparedness at JKIA Despite No Confirmed Cases
item.description: Kenya is stepping up its Ebola preparedness at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport (JKIA) amid rising cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo, where over 1,000 infections and more than 200 deaths ha...

item.title: Sikho Nqothole earns mandatory position for IBF junior bantamweight world title fight after defeating Charlie Edwards
item.description: South African boxer Sikho “Sequence” Nqothole moved a significant step closer to a world title opportunity after defeating England’s Charlie Edwards in an IBF junior bantamweight elimination bout at Y...

item.title: Liverpool axe Arne Slot after disappointing title defence as club seeks tactical evolution
item.description: Liverpool have dismissed head coach Arne Slot following a disappointing defence of their Premier League title. The club, which secured its second league crown under Slot just a year prior, endured a s...

item.title: WHO Director-General Travels to Eastern DR Congo to Assess Ebola Response
item.description: On Saturday, WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus arrived in Bunia, the capital of Ituri province in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, which has been severely hit by a new Ebola outbrea...

item.title: Divorce Records Raise Questions About Financial Hardship Claims in Belle Burden's Memoir
item.description: A Fox News report examines claims made by author and Vanderbilt heiress Belle Burden in her memoir, 'Strangers: A Memoir of Marriage,' in which she described fears of financial ruin following her divo...

item.title: Several Artists Withdraw from Trump’s Freedom 250 State Fair Over Political Concerns
item.description: Multiple well-known musical acts, including Milli Vanilli, The Commodores, Martina McBride, Brett Michaels, and Young MC, have announced their withdrawal from Donald Trump’s Freedom 250 celebration at...

item.title: Columnist Examines the Tight Los Angeles Mayoral Race and Critiques Spencer Pratt’s Campaign
item.description: In this opinion column, Steve Lopez revisits his criticism of mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt and reflects on the increasingly competitive race for mayor of Los Angeles. Lopez notes that Pratt did not...

item.title: Four More Men Successfully Rescued from Partially Flooded Laos Cave
item.description: In Laos, rescue teams have successfully freed four additional men who were trapped in a partially submerged cave, intensifying hopes for a full rescue operation. The trapped men, along with others alr...

item.title: How India’s middle class can adapt to the structural changes brought by the AI economy
item.description: The article discusses how artificial intelligence is reshaping the foundations of India’s middle-class employment model, particularly within the IT and services sector. For decades, India’s growth sto...

item.title: Liverpool parts ways with Arne Slot after trophy-laden tenure
item.description: Liverpool FC has announced that Arne Slot will depart from his role as head coach with immediate effect, with the club initiating the process to appoint a successor. Slot, who arrived in June 2024, st...

item.title: Waratahs finish disappointing season with loss to Force and Jake Gordon Achilles injury
item.description: The NSW Waratahs have ended a difficult Super Rugby season on a low note, falling 31-25 to the Western Force in Perth and losing Wallabies captain Jake Gordon to a serious Achilles tendon injury. The ...

item.title: IMD issues warning as dust storms and strong winds hit Delhi
item.description: On May 30, 2026, several parts of Delhi experienced dust storms and strong winds, prompting the India Meteorological Department (IMD) to issue red and orange alerts. The weather authorities forecast s...

item.title: National Capital Region defends secondary girls’ volleyball title at Palarong Pambansa after win over Negros Island Region
item.description: National Capital Region (NCR) successfully defended its secondary girls’ volleyball title at the 2026 Palarong Pambansa after defeating Negros Island Region (NIR) in four sets, 22-25, 25-14, 25-19, 25...

item.title: IPOA investigates eight deaths linked to fuel protest incidents, including custody and shooting cases
item.description: The Independent Policing Oversight Authority (IPOA) has confirmed that it is actively investigating eight separate deaths that occurred during the May 18, 2026 fuel price hike protests across Kenya. T...

item.title: Italy cancels Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security risks
item.description: Italian authorities have officially cancelled two upcoming concerts by US rappers Kanye West (Ye) and Travis Scott in Reggio Emilia, citing public safety and security concerns. West was due to perform...

item.title: Judge orders removal of Trump’s name from Washington’s Kennedy Centre; board decision challenged as overstepping statutory authority
item.description: A federal judge in the District of Columbia ruled that the Kennedy Centre’s board, which President Trump appointed and positioned as chairman, exceeded its statutory authority by renaming the venue af...

item.title: SADC Ministers Discuss Regional Strategies for Food Security and Agriculture
item.description: Ministers from Southern African Development Community (SADC) countries met in Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe to address pressing issues affecting food security, agriculture, and aquaculture in the region. T...

item.title: Arne Slot Thanks Liverpool Supporters Following Departure After Two Seasons as Head Coach
item.description: Former Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has spoken publicly for the first time since leaving the club, expressing appreciation to Liverpool and its supporters for their backing during his two-year spell...

item.title: Bulls dominate Munster 45-14 to reach URC semifinals in Glasgow
item.description: The Bulls delivered a commanding performance at Loftus Versfeld on Saturday, overpowering Munster 45-14 to secure a spot in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals against Glasgow Warriors. The home...
